extract: Endure (Japanese: こらえる Endure) is a non-damaging Normal-type move introduced in Generation II. It is: TM20 in Generation II. TM58 in Generation IV and in Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl. TR26 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM047 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet. TM035 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.
